title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
problem_statement: Suppose an array sorted in ascending order is rotated at an unknown pivot. Find the minimum element in the array.

examples.explanation: The smallest item is 1 after rotation.

constraints: All values are unique and the array is rotated at some pivot.
intuition: Use binary search by comparing mid to right. If mid > right, the minimum is in the right half; otherwise it is in the left half.

approaches.name: Binary Search Pivot
approaches.description: Track the sorted halves and narrow down the location of the minimum element using mid comparisons.

interview_qa.a: The minimum is always in the half that contains the pivot between sorted segments.

interview_qa.q: Why not compare mid with left?
interview_qa.a: Comparing with right directly identifies whether mid is in the rotated tail or the sorted head.
